que: What is a deep link in Android?
options: A link that takes the user directly to a specific destination in the app

que: Which two types of deep links does the Navigation documentation describe?

What does Android use to match implicit intents into your app?
What happens to the task back stack for an explicit deep link according to Navigation docs?
options: It is cleared and rebuilt around the deep-linked destination
